name: Moroccan Carrots
intro: Want a nice side dish and don't want to heat up the kitchen? Great dinner idea for those hot summer nights.

ingredients.item: (16 ounces) of can garbanzo beans (chickpeas), drained and rinsed
salt and ground pepper to taste

method: Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, cumin, chili powder, salt, and ground black pepper together; stir into carrot mixture. Marinate carrot mixture for 2 hours. Serve with crumbled feta cheese.
